title: High conversion platform engineering
description: Development of custom themes and applications focused on JavaScript interaction and HTML5/CSS3 semantic standards for various clients at the freelance stage.
body:
During an extensive stint as a **freelancer**, I worked for a wide variety of clients and industries, specializing in the development of digital platforms focused on conversion and user experience.

## Custom themes and apps

Each project was a different challenge: e-commerce, corporate portals, high-visibility blogs and interactive web applications. The common denominator was the construction of customized **WordPress** and **PHP** solutions, away from generic themes, adapted to the specific needs of each business.

## JavaScript and interaction

**JavaScript** interactions were a differentiating element: carousels, dynamic filters, multi-step forms, interactive maps and integrations with external **REST APIs**. All with a focus on perceived speed and accessibility.

## Standards and quality

Working with semantic **HTML5** and modular **SCSS** guarantees a solid and maintainable foundation. Version control with **Git** was standard on all projects, even single client ones.

## Technologies

- HTML5
- CSS3
- JavaScript
- SCSS
- REST APIs
- WordPress
- PHP
- Git
